verses.latin_vulgate: Abiit autem Abimelech filius Jerobaal in Sichem ad fratres matris suæ, et locutus est ad eos, et ad omnem cognationem domus patris matris suæ, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֨לֶךְ אֲבִימֶ֤לֶךְ בֶּן־יְרֻבַּ֙עַל֙ שְׁכֶ֔מָה אֶל־אֲחֵ֖י אִמּ֑וֹ וַיְדַבֵּ֣ר אֲלֵיהֶ֔ם וְאֶל־כׇּל־מִשְׁפַּ֛חַת בֵּית־אֲבִ֥י אִמּ֖וֹ לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abimelech, the son of Jerobaal, went to Sichem, to his mother's brethren, and spoke to them, and to all the kindred of his mother's father, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Abimelek, JerubBaalin poika, meni Sikemiin äitinsä veljein tykö, puhui heille ja koko äitinsä isän huoneen sukukunnalle ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: And Abimelech the son of Jerubbaal went to Shechem unto his mother’s brethren, and communed with them, and with all the family of the house of his mother’s father, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Loquimini ad omnes viros Sichem : Quid vobis est melius, ut dominentur vestri septuaginta viri omnes filii Jerobaal, an ut dominetur unus vir ? simulque considerate quod os vestrum et caro vestra sum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דַּבְּרוּ־נָ֞א בְּאׇזְנֵ֨י כׇל־בַּעֲלֵ֣י שְׁכֶם֮ מַה־טּ֣וֹב לָכֶם֒ הַמְשֹׁ֨ל בָּכֶ֜ם שִׁבְעִ֣ים אִ֗ישׁ כֹּ֚ל בְּנֵ֣י יְרֻבַּ֔עַל אִם־מְשֹׁ֥ל בָּכֶ֖ם אִ֣ישׁ אֶחָ֑ד וּזְכַרְתֶּ֕ם כִּֽי־עַצְמְכֶ֥ם וּבְשַׂרְכֶ֖ם אָֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Speak to all the men of Sichem: whether is better for you that seventy men, all the sons of Jerobaal, should rule over you, or that one man should rule over you? And withal, consider that I am your bone, and your flesh.
verses.finnish_biblia: Puhukaat nyt kaikkein päämiesten korvissa Sikemissä: mikä teille on parempi, että seitsemänkymmentä miestä, kaikki JerubBaalin pojat, hallitsevat teitä, eli jos yksi mies hallitsee teitä? Ja muistakaat, että minä olen teidän luunne ja lihanne.
verses.king_james: Speak, I pray you, in the ears of all the men of Shechem, Whether is better for you, either that all the sons of Jerubbaal, which are threescore and ten persons, reign over you, or that one reign over you? remember also that I am your bone and your flesh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutique sunt fratres matris ejus de eo ad omnes viros Sichem universos sermones istos, et inclinaverunt cor eorum post Abimelech, dicentes : Frater noster est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבְּר֨וּ אֲחֵי־אִמּ֜וֹ עָלָ֗יו בְּאׇזְנֵי֙ כׇּל־בַּעֲלֵ֣י שְׁכֶ֔ם אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֖ים הָאֵ֑לֶּה וַיֵּ֤ט לִבָּם֙ אַחֲרֵ֣י אֲבִימֶ֔לֶךְ כִּ֥י אָמְר֖וּ אָחִ֥ינוּ הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his mother's brethren spoke of him to all the men of Sichem, all these words, and they inclined their hearts after Abimelech, saying: He is our brother:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin puhuivat hänen äitinsä veljet kaikki nämät sanat hänestä kaikkein Sikemin päämiesten korvissa; ja heidän sydämensä käännettiin AbiMelekin jälkeen, sillä he sanoivat: hän on meidän veljemme.
verses.king_james: And his mother’s brethren spake of him in the ears of all the men of Shechem all these words: and their hearts inclined to follow Abimelech; for they said, He is our brother.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dederuntque illi septuaginta pondo argenti de fano Baalberit. Qui conduxit sibi ex eo viros inopes et vagos, secutique sunt eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְּנוּ־לוֹ֙ שִׁבְעִ֣ים כֶּ֔סֶף מִבֵּ֖ית בַּ֣עַל בְּרִ֑ית וַיִּשְׂכֹּ֨ר בָּהֶ֜ם אֲבִימֶ֗לֶךְ אֲנָשִׁ֤ים רֵיקִים֙ וּפֹ֣חֲזִ֔ים וַיֵּלְכ֖וּ אַחֲרָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they gave him seventy weight of silver out of the temple of Baalberith: wherewith he hired to himself men that were needy, and vagabonds, and they followed him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he antoivat hänelle seitsemänkymmentä hopiapenninkiä BaalBeritin huoneesta, joilla AbiMelek palkkasi itsellensä valtojamia ja joutilaita miehiä, jotka häntä seurasivat,
verses.king_james: And they gave him threescore and ten pieces of silver out of the house of Baal–berith, wherewith Abimelech hired vain and light persons, which followed him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et venit in domum patris sui in Ephra, et occidit fratres suos filios Jerobaal, septuaginta viros super lapidem unum : remansitque Joatham filius Jerobaal minimus, et absconditus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֤א בֵית־אָבִיו֙ עׇפְרָ֔תָה וַֽיַּהֲרֹ֞ג אֶת־אֶחָ֧יו בְּנֵי־יְרֻבַּ֛עַל שִׁבְעִ֥ים אִ֖ישׁ עַל־אֶ֣בֶן אֶחָ֑ת וַיִּוָּתֵ֞ר יוֹתָ֧ם בֶּן־יְרֻבַּ֛עַל הַקָּטֹ֖ן כִּ֥י נֶחְבָּֽא׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he came to his father's house in Ephra, and slew his brethren, the sons of Jerobaal, seventy men, upon one stone: and there remained only Joatham, the youngest son of Jerobaal, who was hidden.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän tuli isänsä huoneesen Ophraan, ja murhasi seitsemänkymmentä veljeänsä, JerubBaalin poikaa, yhden kiven päällä. Mutta Jotam, nuorin JerubBaalin pojista jäi; sillä hän kätki itsensä.
verses.king_james: And he went unto his father’s house at Ophrah, and slew his brethren the sons of Jerubbaal, being threescore and ten persons, upon one stone: notwithstanding yet Jotham the youngest son of Jerubbaal was left; for he hid himself.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregati sunt autem omnes viri Sichem, et universæ familiæ urbis Mello : abieruntque et constituerunt regem Abimelech, juxta quercum quæ stabat in Sichem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּאָ֨סְפ֜וּ כׇּל־בַּעֲלֵ֤י שְׁכֶם֙ וְכׇל־בֵּ֣ית מִלּ֔וֹא וַיֵּ֣לְכ֔וּ וַיַּמְלִ֥יכוּ אֶת־אֲבִימֶ֖לֶךְ לְמֶ֑לֶךְ עִם־אֵל֥וֹן מֻצָּ֖ב אֲשֶׁ֥ר בִּשְׁכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the men of Sichem were gathered together, and all the families of the city of Mello: and they went and made Abimelech king, by the oak that stood in Sichem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikki päämiehet Sikemistä ja koko Millon huone kokoontuivat, ja menivät ja asettivat Abimelekin kuninkaaksi korkian tammen tykönä, joka Sikemissä on.
verses.king_james: And all the men of Shechem gathered together, and all the house of Millo, and went, and made Abimelech king, by the plain of the pillar that was in Shechem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum nuntiatum esset Joatham, ivit, et stetit in vertice montis Garizim : elevataque voce, clamavit, et dixit : Audite me, viri Sichem ; ita audiat vos Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּגִּ֣דוּ לְיוֹתָ֗ם וַיֵּ֙לֶךְ֙ וַֽיַּעֲמֹד֙ בְּרֹ֣אשׁ הַר־גְּרִזִ֔ים וַיִּשָּׂ֥א קוֹל֖וֹ וַיִּקְרָ֑א וַיֹּ֣אמֶר לָהֶ֗ם שִׁמְע֤וּ אֵלַי֙ בַּעֲלֵ֣י שְׁכֶ֔ם וְיִשְׁמַ֥ע אֲלֵיכֶ֖ם אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: This being told to Joatham, he went, and stood on the top of Mount Garizim: and lifting up his voice, he cried, and said: Hear me, ye men of Sichem, so may God hear you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin tämä sanottiin Jotamille, meni hän pois ja seisoi Gerisimin vuoren kukkulalla, korotti äänensä ja huusi ja sanoi heille: kuulkaat minua, te Sikemin päämiehet, että Jumala myös kuulis teitä:
verses.king_james: And when they told it to Jotham, he went and stood in the top of mount Gerizim, and lifted up his voice, and cried, and said unto them, Hearken unto me, ye men of Shechem, that God may hearken unto you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ierunt ligna, ut ungerent super se regem : dixeruntque olivæ : Impera nobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָל֤וֹךְ הָֽלְכוּ֙ הָעֵצִ֔ים לִמְשֹׁ֥חַ עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם מֶ֑לֶךְ וַיֹּאמְר֥וּ לַזַּ֖יִת (מלוכה) [מׇלְכָ֥ה] עָלֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The trees went to anoint a king over them: and they said to the olive tree: Reign thou over us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Puut menivät kerran yksimielisesti voitelemaan itsellensä kuningasta ja sanoivat öljypuulle: ole meidän kuninkaamme.
verses.king_james: The trees went forth on a time to anoint a king over them; and they said unto the olive tree, Reign thou over us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quæ respondit : Numquid possum deserere pinguedinem meam, qua et dii utuntur et homines, et venire ut inter ligna promovear ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר לָהֶם֙ הַזַּ֔יִת הֶחֳדַ֙לְתִּי֙ אֶת־דִּשְׁנִ֔י אֲשֶׁר־בִּ֛י יְכַבְּד֥וּ אֱלֹהִ֖ים וַאֲנָשִׁ֑ים וְהָ֣לַכְתִּ֔י לָנ֖וּעַ עַל־הָעֵצִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it answered: Can I leave my fatness, which both gods and men make use of, to come to be promoted among the trees?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta öljypuu vastasi heitä: pitääkö minun luopuman lihavuudestani, jolla sekä jumalia ja myös ihmisiä minussa kunnioitetaan, ja menemän ja korottaman itseni puiden ylitse?
verses.king_james: But the olive tree said unto them, Should I leave my fatness, wherewith by me they honour God and man, and go to be promoted over the trees?

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixeruntque ligna ad arborem ficum : Veni, et super nos regnum accipe.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֥וּ הָעֵצִ֖ים לַתְּאֵנָ֑ה לְכִי־אַ֖תְּ מׇלְכִ֥י עָלֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the trees said to the fig tree: Come thou and reign over us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin puut sanoivat fikunapuulle: tule sinä ja ole meidän kuninkaamme.
verses.king_james: And the trees said to the fig tree, Come thou, and reign over us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quæ respondit eis : Numquid possum deserere dulcedinem meam, fructusque suavissimos, et ire ut inter cetera ligna promovear ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֹּ֤אמֶר לָהֶם֙ הַתְּאֵנָ֔ה הֶחֳדַ֙לְתִּי֙ אֶת־מׇתְקִ֔י וְאֶת־תְּנוּבָתִ֖י הַטּוֹבָ֑ה וְהָ֣לַכְתִּ֔י לָנ֖וּעַ עַל־הָעֵצִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it answered them: Can I leave my sweetness, and my delicious fruits, and go to be promoted among the other trees?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta fikunapuu sanoi heille: pitääkö minun luopuman makeudestani ja parhaasta hedelmästäni, ja menemän ja korottaman itseni puiden ylitse?
verses.king_james: But the fig tree said unto them, Should I forsake my sweetness, and my good fruit, and go to be promoted over the trees?

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutaque sunt ligna ad vitem : Veni, et impera nobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֥וּ הָעֵצִ֖ים לַגָּ֑פֶן לְכִי־אַ֖תְּ (מלוכי) [מׇלְכִ֥י] עָלֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the trees said to the vine: Come thou and reign over us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoivat puut viinapuulle: tule sinä ja ole meidän kuninkaamme.
verses.king_james: Then said the trees unto the vine, Come thou, and reign over us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quæ respondit eis : Numquid possum deserere vinum meum, quod lætificat Deum et homines, et inter ligna cetera promoveri ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֹּ֤אמֶר לָהֶם֙ הַגֶּ֔פֶן הֶחֳדַ֙לְתִּי֙ אֶת־תִּ֣ירוֹשִׁ֔י הַֽמְשַׂמֵּ֥חַ אֱלֹהִ֖ים וַאֲנָשִׁ֑ים וְהָ֣לַכְתִּ֔י לָנ֖וּעַ עַל־הָעֵצִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it answered them: Can I forsake my wine, that cheereth God and men, and be promoted among the other trees?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta viinapuu sanoi heille: pitääkö minun luopuman viinastani, joka sekä jumalat että ihmiset ilahuttaa, ja menemän ja korottaman itseni puiden ylitse?
verses.king_james: And the vine said unto them, Should I leave my wine, which cheereth God and man, and go to be promoted over the trees?

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixeruntque omnia ligna ad rhamnum : Veni, et impera super nos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֥וּ כׇל־הָעֵצִ֖ים אֶל־הָאָטָ֑ד לֵ֥ךְ אַתָּ֖ה מְלׇךְ־עָלֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the trees said to the bramble: Come thou and reign over us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoivat kaikki puut orjantappuralle: tule sinä ja ole meidän kuninkaamme.
verses.king_james: Then said all the trees unto the bramble, Come thou, and reign over us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quæ respondit eis : Si vere me regem vobis constituitis, venite, et sub umbra mea requiescite : si autem non vultis, egrediatur ignis de rhamno, et devoret cedros Libani.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר הָאָטָד֮ אֶל־הָעֵצִים֒ אִ֡ם בֶּאֱמֶ֣ת אַתֶּם֩ מֹשְׁחִ֨ים אֹתִ֤י לְמֶ֙לֶךְ֙ עֲלֵיכֶ֔ם בֹּ֖אוּ חֲס֣וּ בְצִלִּ֑י וְאִם־אַ֕יִן תֵּ֤צֵא אֵשׁ֙ מִן־הָ֣אָטָ֔ד וְתֹאכַ֖ל אֶת־אַרְזֵ֥י הַלְּבָנֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it answered them: If, indeed, you mean to make me king, come ye, and rest under my shadow: but if you mean it not, let fire come out from the bramble, and devour the cedars of Libanus.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja orjantappura sanoi puille: onko se tosi, että tahdotte minua voidella teillenne kuninkaaksi, niin tulkaat ja levätkäät minun varjoni alla. Mutta jos ei, niin lähtekään tuli orjantappurapensaasta ja polttakaan sedripuut Libanonissa.
verses.king_james: And the bramble said unto the trees, If in truth ye anoint me king over you, then come and put your trust in my shadow: and if not, let fire come out of the bramble, and devour the cedars of Lebanon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc igitur, si recte et absque peccato constituistis super vos regem Abimelech, et bene egistis cum Jerobaal, et cum domo ejus, et reddidistis vicem beneficiis ejus, qui pugnavit pro vobis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה אִם־בֶּאֱמֶ֤ת וּבְתָמִים֙ עֲשִׂיתֶ֔ם וַתַּמְלִ֖יכוּ אֶת־אֲבִימֶ֑לֶךְ וְאִם־טוֹבָ֤ה עֲשִׂיתֶם֙ עִם־יְרֻבַּ֣עַל וְעִם־בֵּית֔וֹ וְאִם־כִּגְמ֥וּל יָדָ֖יו עֲשִׂ֥יתֶם לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now, therefore, if you have done well, and without sin, in appointing Abimelech king over you, and have dealt well with Jerobaal, and with his house, and have made a suitable return for the benefits of him who fought for you,
verses.finnish_biblia: Oletteko te siis nyt oikein ja toimellisesti tehneet, kuin AbiMelekin kuninkaaksi teitte, ja oletteko te oikein tehneet JerubBaalia ja hänen huonettansa vastaan? Ja oletteko niin tehneet häntä vastaan kuin hän ansaitsikin teiltä?
verses.king_james: Now therefore, if ye have done truly and sincerely, in that ye have made Abimelech king, and if ye have dealt well with Jerubbaal and his house, and have done unto him according to the deserving of his hands;

verses.latin_vulgate: et animam suam dedit periculis, ut erueret vos de manu Madian,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁר־נִלְחַ֥ם אָבִ֖י עֲלֵיכֶ֑ם וַיַּשְׁלֵ֤ךְ אֶת־נַפְשׁוֹ֙ מִנֶּ֔גֶד וַיַּצֵּ֥ל אֶתְכֶ֖ם מִיַּ֥ד מִדְיָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And exposed his life to dangers, to deliver you from the hand of Madian,
verses.finnish_biblia: Että minun isäni on teidän edessänne sotinut ja antanut henkensä alttiiksi, vapahtaaksensa teitä Midianilaisten kädestä.
verses.king_james: (For my father fought for you, and adventured his life far, and delivered you out of the hand of Midian:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui nunc surrexistis contra domum patris mei, et interfecistis filios ejus septuaginta viros super unum lapidem, et constituistis regem Abimelech filium ancillæ ejus super habitatores Sichem, eo quod frater vester sit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתֶּ֞ם קַמְתֶּ֨ם עַל־בֵּ֤ית אָבִי֙ הַיּ֔וֹם וַתַּהַרְג֧וּ אֶת־בָּנָ֛יו שִׁבְעִ֥ים אִ֖ישׁ עַל־אֶ֣בֶן אֶחָ֑ת וַתַּמְלִ֜יכוּ אֶת־אֲבִימֶ֤לֶךְ בֶּן־אֲמָתוֹ֙ עַל־בַּעֲלֵ֣י שְׁכֶ֔ם כִּ֥י אֲחִיכֶ֖ם הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And you are now risen up against my father's house, and have killed his sons, seventy men, upon one stone, and have made Abimelech, the son of his handmaid, king over the inhabitants of Sichem, because he is your brother:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja te olette nousseet minun isäni huonetta vastaan tänäpänä ja olette tappaneet hänen poikansa, seitsemänkymmentä miestä yhden kiven päällä; ja teitte teillenne AbiMelekin, hänen piikansa pojan, kuninkaaksi Sikemin päämiesten ylitse, että hän teidän veljenne on.
verses.king_james: And ye are risen up against my father’s house this day, and have slain his sons, threescore and ten persons, upon one stone, and have made Abimelech, the son of his maidservant, king over the men of Shechem, because he is your brother;)

verses.latin_vulgate: si ergo recte et absque vitio egistis cum Jerobaal et domo ejus, hodie lætamini in Abimelech, et ille lætetur in vobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־בֶּאֱמֶ֨ת וּבְתָמִ֧ים עֲשִׂיתֶ֛ם עִם־יְרֻבַּ֥עַל וְעִם־בֵּית֖וֹ הַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֑ה שִׂמְחוּ֙ בַּאֲבִימֶ֔לֶךְ וְיִשְׂמַ֥ח גַּם־ה֖וּא בָּכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: If therefore you have dealt well, and without fault, with Jerobaal and his house, rejoice ye, this day, in Abimelech, and may he rejoice in you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos olette oikein ja toimellisesti tehneet JerubBaalia ja hänen huonettansa vastaan tänäpänä, niin iloitkaat AbiMelekistä, ja hän myös iloitkaan teistä.
verses.king_james: If ye then have dealt truly and sincerely with Jerubbaal and with his house this day, then rejoice ye in Abimelech, and let him also rejoice in you:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sin autem perverse : egrediatur ignis ex eo, et consumat habitatores Sichem, et oppidum Mello : egrediaturque ignis de viris Sichem, et de oppido Mello, et devoret Abimelech.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־אַ֕יִן תֵּ֤צֵא אֵשׁ֙ מֵאֲבִימֶ֔לֶךְ וְתֹאכַ֛ל אֶת־בַּעֲלֵ֥י שְׁכֶ֖ם וְאֶת־בֵּ֣ית מִלּ֑וֹא וְתֵצֵ֨א אֵ֜שׁ מִבַּעֲלֵ֤י שְׁכֶם֙ וּמִבֵּ֣ית מִלּ֔וֹא וְתֹאכַ֖ל אֶת־אֲבִימֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if unjustly: let fire come out from him, and consume the inhabitants of Sichem, and the town of Mello: and let fire come out from the men of Sichem and from the town of Mello, and devour Abimelech.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta jollei, niin lähteköön tuli AbiMelekistä ja polttakoon Sikemin päämiehet ja Millon huoneen; lähteköön myös tuli Sikemin päämiehistä ja Millon huoneesta ja polttakoon AbiMelekin.
verses.king_james: But if not, let fire come out from Abimelech, and devour the men of Shechem, and the house of Millo; and let fire come out from the men of Shechem, and from the house of Millo, and devour Abimelech.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quæ cum dixisset, fugit, et abiit in Bera : habitavitque ibi ob metum Abimelech fratris sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣נׇס יוֹתָ֔ם וַיִּבְרַ֖ח וַיֵּ֣לֶךְ בְּאֵ֑רָה וַיֵּ֣שֶׁב שָׁ֔ם מִפְּנֵ֖י אֲבִימֶ֥לֶךְ אָחִֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And when he had said thus, he fled, and went into Bera: and dwelt there for fear of Abimelech, his brother.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jotam pakeni ja vältti, ja meni Beeraan ja asui siellä veljensä AbiMelekin tähden.
verses.king_james: And Jotham ran away, and fled, and went to Beer, and dwelt there, for fear of Abimelech his brother.

verses.latin_vulgate: Regnavit itaque Abimelech super Israël tribus annis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֧שַׂר אֲבִימֶ֛לֶךְ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל שָׁלֹ֥שׁ שָׁנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Abimelech reigned over Israel three years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin AbiMelek jo kolme vuotta oli hallinnut Israelia,
verses.king_james: When Abimelech had reigned three years over Israel,

verses.latin_vulgate: Misitque Dominus spiritum pessimum inter Abimelech et habitatores Sichem : qui cœperunt eum detestari,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֤ח אֱלֹהִים֙ ר֣וּחַ רָעָ֔ה בֵּ֣ין אֲבִימֶ֔לֶךְ וּבֵ֖ין בַּעֲלֵ֣י שְׁכֶ֑ם וַיִּבְגְּד֥וּ בַעֲלֵֽי־שְׁכֶ֖ם בַּאֲבִימֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord sent a very evil spirit between Abimelech and the inhabitants of Sichem; who began to detest him,
verses.finnish_biblia: Lähetti Jumala pahan hengen AbiMelekin ja Sikemin päämiesten välille: ja Sikemin päämiehet asettivat itsensä AbiMelekiä vastaan;
verses.king_james: Then God sent an evil spirit between Abimelech and the men of Shechem; and the men of Shechem dealt treacherously with Abimelech:

verses.latin_vulgate: et scelus interfectionis septuaginta filiorum Jerobaal, et effusionem sanguinis eorum conferre in Abimelech fratrem suum, et in ceteros Sichimorum principes, qui eum adjuverant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָב֕וֹא חֲמַ֖ס שִׁבְעִ֣ים בְּנֵֽי־יְרֻבָּ֑עַל וְדָמָ֗ם לָשׂ֞וּם עַל־אֲבִימֶ֤לֶךְ אֲחִיהֶם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָרַ֣ג אוֹתָ֔ם וְעַל֙ בַּעֲלֵ֣י שְׁכֶ֔ם אֲשֶׁר־חִזְּק֥וּ אֶת־יָדָ֖יו לַהֲרֹ֥ג אֶת־אֶחָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to lay the crime of the murder of the seventy sons of Jerobaal, and the shedding of their blood, upon Abimelech, their brother, and upon the rest of the princes of the Sichemites, who aided him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että se vääryys, jonka hän teki seitsemällekymmenelle JerubBaalin pojalle, ja heidän verensä tulis ja pantaisiin AbiMelekin heidän veljensä päälle, joka heidät oli murhannut, ja Sikemin päämiesten päälle, jotka olivat vahvistaneet hänen kätensä veljiänsä murhaamaan.
verses.king_james: That the cruelty done to the threescore and ten sons of Jerubbaal might come, and their blood be laid upon Abimelech their brother, which slew them; and upon the men of Shechem, which aided him in the killing of his brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posueruntque insidias adversus eum in summitate montium : et dum illius præstolabantur adventum, exercebant latrocinia, agentes prædas de prætereuntibus : nuntiatumque est Abimelech.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּשִׂ֣ימוּ לוֹ֩ בַעֲלֵ֨י שְׁכֶ֜ם מְאָֽרְבִ֗ים עַ֚ל רָאשֵׁ֣י הֶהָרִ֔ים וַֽיִּגְזְל֔וּ אֵ֛ת כׇּל־אֲשֶׁר־יַעֲבֹ֥ר עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם בַּדָּ֑רֶךְ וַיֻּגַּ֖ד לַאֲבִימֶֽלֶךְ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they set an ambush against him on the top of the mountains: and while they waited for his coming, they committed robberies, taking spoils of all that passed by: and it was told Abimelech.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Sikemin päämiehet panivat väijyjiä vuorten kukkoille häntä vastaan, ja he ryöväsivät tiellä kaikki, jotka siitä matkustivat; ja se ilmoitettiin AbiMelekille.
verses.king_james: And the men of Shechem set liers in wait for him in the top of the mountains, and they robbed all that came along that way by them: and it was told Abimelech.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venit autem Gaal filius Obed cum fratribus suis, et transivit in Sichimam. Ad cujus adventum erecti habitatores Sichem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֞א גַּ֤עַל בֶּן־עֶ֙בֶד֙ וְאֶחָ֔יו וַיַּעַבְר֖וּ בִּשְׁכֶ֑ם וַיִּבְטְחוּ־ב֖וֹ בַּעֲלֵ֥י שְׁכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Gaal, the son of Obed, came with his brethren, and went over to Sichem. And the inhabitants of Sichem, taking courage at his coming,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tuli Gaal Ebedin poika ja hänen veljensä, ja menivät Sikemiin; ja Sikemin päämiehet uskalsivat hänen päällensä,
verses.king_james: And Gaal the son of Ebed came with his brethren, and went over to Shechem: and the men of Shechem put their confidence in him.

verses.latin_vulgate: egressi sunt in agros, vastantes vineas, uvasque calcantes : et factis cantantium choris, ingressi sunt fanum dei sui, et inter epulas et pocula maledicebant Abimelech,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצְא֨וּ הַשָּׂדֶ֜ה וַֽיִּבְצְר֤וּ אֶת־כַּרְמֵיהֶם֙ וַֽיִּדְרְכ֔וּ וַֽיַּעֲשׂ֖וּ הִלּוּלִ֑ים וַיָּבֹ֙אוּ֙ בֵּ֣ית אֱֽלֹהֵיהֶ֔ם וַיֹּֽאכְלוּ֙ וַיִּשְׁתּ֔וּ וַֽיְקַלְל֖וּ אֶת־אֲבִימֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Went out into the fields, wasting the vineyards, and treading down the grapes: and singing and dancing, they went into the temple of their god, and in their banquets and cups they cursed Abimelech.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja menivät kedolle, ja poimivat viinamäkensä ja sotkuivat, ja iloiten veisasivat, ja menivät jumalansa huoneeseen, söivät ja joivat, ja kirosivat AbiMelekiä.
verses.king_james: And they went out into the fields, and gathered their vineyards, and trode the grapes, and made merry, and went into the house of their god, and did eat and drink, and cursed Abimelech.

verses.latin_vulgate: clamante Gaal filio Obed : Quis est Abimelech, et quæ est Sichem, ut serviamus ei ? numquid non est filius Jerobaal, et constituit principem Zebul servum suum super viros Emor patris Sichem ? cur ergo serviemus ei ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר ׀ גַּ֣עַל בֶּן־עֶ֗בֶד מִֽי־אֲבִימֶ֤לֶךְ וּמִֽי־שְׁכֶם֙ כִּ֣י נַעַבְדֶ֔נּוּ הֲלֹ֥א בֶן־יְרֻבַּ֖עַל וּזְבֻ֣ל פְּקִיד֑וֹ עִבְד֗וּ אֶת־אַנְשֵׁ֤י חֲמוֹר֙ אֲבִ֣י שְׁכֶ֔ם וּמַדּ֖וּעַ נַעַבְדֶ֥נּוּ אֲנָֽחְנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Gaal, the son of Obed, cried: Who is Abimelech, and what is Sichem, that we should serve him? Is he not the son of Jerobaal, and hath made Zebul, his servant, ruler over the men of Emor, the father of Sichem? Why then shall we serve him?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Gaal Ebedin poika sanoi: mikä on AbiMelek ja mikä on Sikem, että me häntä palvelemme? eikö hän ole JerubBaalin poika, ja Sebul hänen päämiehensä? Palvelkaat paremmin Hemorin Sikemin isän miehiä: miksi meidän pitää häntä palveleman?
verses.king_james: And Gaal the son of Ebed said, Who is Abimelech, and who is Shechem, that we should serve him? is not he the son of Jerubbaal? and Zebul his officer? serve the men of Hamor the father of Shechem: for why should we serve him?

verses.latin_vulgate: utinam daret aliquis populum istum sub manu mea, ut auferrem de medio Abimelech. Dictumque est Abimelech : Congrega exercitus multitudinem, et veni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִ֨י יִתֵּ֜ן אֶת־הָעָ֤ם הַזֶּה֙ בְּיָדִ֔י וְאָסִ֖ירָה אֶת־אֲבִימֶ֑לֶךְ וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ לַאֲבִימֶ֔לֶךְ רַבֶּ֥ה צְבָאֲךָ֖ וָצֵֽאָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Would to God that some man would put this people under my hand, that I might remove Abimelech out of the way. And it was said to Abimelech: Gather together the multitude of an army, and come.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala tekis että kansa olis minun käteni alla, että minä ajaisin AbiMelekin ulos. Niin sanottiin AbiMelekille: enennä sotajoukkos ja käy ulos.
verses.king_james: And would to God this people were under my hand! then would I remove Abimelech. And he said to Abimelech, Increase thine army, and come out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Zebul enim princeps civitatis, auditis sermonibus Gaal filii Obed, iratus est valde,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמַ֗ע זְבֻל֙ שַׂר־הָעִ֔יר אֶת־דִּבְרֵ֖י גַּ֣עַל בֶּן־עָ֑בֶד וַיִּ֖חַר אַפּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For Zebul, the ruler of the city, hearing the words of Gaal, the son of Obed, was very angry,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Sebul, kaupungin päämies, kuuli Gaalin, Ebedin pojan, sanan, vihastui hän sangen suuresti.
verses.king_james: And when Zebul the ruler of the city heard the words of Gaal the son of Ebed, his anger was kindled.

verses.latin_vulgate: et misit clam ad Abimelech nuntios, dicens : Ecce Gaal filius Obed venit in Sichimam cum fratribus suis, et oppugnat adversum te civitatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֧ח מַלְאָכִ֛ים אֶל־אֲבִימֶ֖לֶךְ בְּתׇרְמָ֣ה לֵאמֹ֑ר הִנֵּה֩ גַ֨עַל בֶּן־עֶ֤בֶד וְאֶחָיו֙ בָּאִ֣ים שְׁכֶ֔מָה וְהִנָּ֛ם צָרִ֥ים אֶת־הָעִ֖יר עָלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And sent messengers privately to Abimelech, saying: Behold, Gaal, the son of Obed, is come into Sichem with his brethren, and endeavoureth to set the city against thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja lähetti sanansaattajat AbiMelekille salaisesti, sanoen: Katso, Gaal, Ebedin poika ja hänen veljensä tulivat Sikemiin, tekemään kaupunkia sinulle vastahakoiseksi.
verses.king_james: And he sent messengers unto Abimelech privily, saying, Behold, Gaal the son of Ebed and his brethren be come to Shechem; and, behold, they fortify the city against thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surge itaque nocte cum populo qui tecum est, et latita in agro :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּה֙ ק֣וּם לַ֔יְלָה אַתָּ֖ה וְהָעָ֣ם אֲשֶׁר־אִתָּ֑ךְ וֶאֱרֹ֖ב בַּשָּׂדֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Arise, therefore, in the night, with the people that is with thee, and lie hid in the field:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin nouse nyt yöllä, sinä ja sinun väkes, joka myötäs on, ja väijy kedolla;
verses.king_james: Now therefore up by night, thou and the people that is with thee, and lie in wait in the field:

verses.latin_vulgate: et primo mane, oriente sole, irrue super civitatem. Illo autem egrediente adversum te cum populo suo, fac ei quod potueris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֤ה בַבֹּ֙קֶר֙ כִּזְרֹ֣חַ הַשֶּׁ֔מֶשׁ תַּשְׁכִּ֖ים וּפָשַׁטְתָּ֣ עַל־הָעִ֑יר וְהִנֵּה־ה֞וּא וְהָעָ֤ם אֲשֶׁר־אִתּוֹ֙ יֹצְאִ֣ים אֵלֶ֔יךָ וְעָשִׂ֣יתָ לּ֔וֹ כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר תִּמְצָ֥א יָדֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And betimes in the morning, at sun rising, set upon the city, and when he shall come out against thee, with his people, do to him what thou shalt be able.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja aamulla, kuin aurinko nousee, ole varhain ylhäällä ja karkaa kaupungin päälle. Ja kuin hän ja se kansa, joka hänen myötänsä on, tulevat sinun tykös, niin tee hänen kanssansa niinkuin sinun kätes löytää.
verses.king_james: And it shall be, that in the morning, as soon as the sun is up, thou shalt rise early, and set upon the city: and, behold, when he and the people that is with him come out against thee, then mayest thou do to them as thou shalt find occasion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surrexit itaque Abimelech cum omni exercitu suo nocte, et tetendit insidias juxta Sichimam in quatuor locis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֧קׇם אֲבִימֶ֛לֶךְ וְכׇל־הָעָ֥ם אֲשֶׁר־עִמּ֖וֹ לָ֑יְלָה וַיֶּאֶרְב֣וּ עַל־שְׁכֶ֔ם אַרְבָּעָ֖ה רָאשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abimelech, therefore, arose with all his army, by night, and laid ambushes near Sichem in four places.
verses.finnish_biblia: AbiMelek nousi yöllä ja kaikki kansa, joka hänen seurassansa oli, ja asetti vartian Sikemin eteen neljään joukkoon.
verses.king_james: And Abimelech rose up, and all the people that were with him, by night, and they laid wait against Shechem in four companies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressusque est Gaal filius Obed, et stetit in introitu portæ civitatis. Surrexit autem Abimelech, et omnis exercitus cum eo, de insidiarum loco.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵא֙ גַּ֣עַל בֶּן־עֶ֔בֶד וַיַּעֲמֹ֕ד פֶּ֖תַח שַׁ֣עַר הָעִ֑יר וַיָּ֧קׇם אֲבִימֶ֛לֶךְ וְהָעָ֥ם אֲשֶׁר־אִתּ֖וֹ מִן־הַמַּאְרָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Gaal, the son of Obed, went out, and stood in the entrance of the gate of the city. And Abimelech rose up, and all his army with him, from the places of the ambushes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Gaal, Ebedin poika, kävi kaupungin portin eteen; mutta AbiMelek nousi väijymisestänsä sen väen kanssa, joka hänen myötänsä oli.
verses.king_james: And Gaal the son of Ebed went out, and stood in the entering of the gate of the city: and Abimelech rose up, and the people that were with him, from lying in wait.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque vidisset populum Gaal, dixit ad Zebul : Ecce de montibus multitudo descendit. Cui ille respondit : Umbras montium vides quasi capita hominum, et hoc errore deciperis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּרְא־גַּ֘עַל֮ אֶת־הָעָם֒ וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֶל־זְבֻ֔ל הִנֵּה־עָ֣ם יוֹרֵ֔ד מֵרָאשֵׁ֖י הֶהָרִ֑ים וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֵלָיו֙ זְבֻ֔ל אֵ֣ת צֵ֧ל הֶהָרִ֛ים אַתָּ֥ה רֹאֶ֖ה כָּאֲנָשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Gaal saw the people, he said to Zebul: Behold, a multitude cometh down from the mountains. And he answered him: Thou seest the shadows of the mountains as if they were the heads of men, and this is thy mistake.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Gaal näki kansan, sanoi hän Sebulille: katso, tuolta tulee kansan joukko alas vuorten kukkoilta. Ja Sebul sanoi hänelle: sinä näet vuorten varjon niinkuin ihmiset.
verses.king_james: And when Gaal saw the people, he said to Zebul, Behold, there come people down from the top of the mountains. And Zebul said unto him, Thou seest the shadow of the mountains as if they were men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rursumque Gaal ait : Ecce populus de umbilico terræ descendit, et unus cuneus venit per viam quæ respicit quercum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨סֶף ע֣וֹד גַּ֘עַל֮ לְדַבֵּר֒ וַיֹּ֕אמֶר הִנֵּה־עָם֙ יֽוֹרְדִ֔ים מֵעִ֖ם טַבּ֣וּר הָאָ֑רֶץ וְרֹאשׁ־אֶחָ֣ד בָּ֔א מִדֶּ֖רֶךְ אֵל֥וֹן מְעוֹנְנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Again Gaal said: Behold, there cometh people down from the midst of the land, and one troop cometh by the way that looketh towards the oak.
verses.finnish_biblia: Gaal puhui taas ja sanoi: katso, tuolta tulee kansan joukko alas keskeltä maata ja yksi joukko tulee Noituustammen tieltä.
verses.king_james: And Gaal spake again and said, See there come people down by the middle of the land, and another company come along by the plain of Meonenim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cui dixit Zebul : Ubi est nunc os tuum, quo loquebaris : Quis est Abimelech ut serviamus ei ? nonne hic populus est, quem despiciebas ? egredere, et pugna contra eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר אֵלָ֜יו זְבֻ֗ל אַיֵּ֨ה אֵפ֥וֹא פִ֙יךָ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר תֹּאמַ֔ר מִ֥י אֲבִימֶ֖לֶךְ כִּ֣י נַעַבְדֶ֑נּוּ הֲלֹ֨א זֶ֤ה הָעָם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר מָאַ֣סְתָּה בּ֔וֹ צֵא־נָ֥א עַתָּ֖ה וְהִלָּ֥חֶם בּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Zebul said to him: Where is now thy mouth, wherewith thou saidst: Who is Abimelech, that we should serve him? Is not this the people which thou didst despise? Go out, and fight against him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Sebul hänelle: kussa on nyt sinun suus, joka sanoi: kuka on AbiMelek, että meidän häntä palveleman pitää? eikö tämä ole se kansa, jonkas olet katsonut ylön? käy nyt ulos ja sodi häntä vastaan.
verses.king_james: Then said Zebul unto him, Where is now thy mouth, wherewith thou saidst, Who is Abimelech, that we should serve him? is not this the people that thou hast despised? go out, I pray now, and fight with them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abiit ergo Gaal, spectante Sichimorum populo, et pugnavit contra Abimelech,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֣צֵא גַ֔עַל לִפְנֵ֖י בַּעֲלֵ֣י שְׁכֶ֑ם וַיִּלָּ֖חֶם בַּאֲבִימֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Gaal went out, in the sight of the people of Sichem, and fought against Abimelech,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Gaal meni Sikemin päämiesten edellä ja soti AbiMelekiä vastaan.
verses.king_james: And Gaal went out before the men of Shechem, and fought with Abimelech.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui persecutus est eum fugientem, et in urbem compulit : cecideruntque ex parte ejus plurimi, usque ad portam civitatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּרְדְּפֵ֣הוּ אֲבִימֶ֔לֶךְ וַיָּ֖נׇס מִפָּנָ֑יו וַֽיִּפְּל֛וּ חֲלָלִ֥ים רַבִּ֖ים עַד־פֶּ֥תַח הַשָּֽׁעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who chased and put him to flight, and drove him to the city: and many were slain of his people, even to the gate of the city:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta AbiMelek ajoi häntä takaa, ja hän pakeni hänen edestänsä; ja monta lankesi lyötynä kaupungin porttiin saakka.
verses.king_james: And Abimelech chased him, and he fled before him, and many were overthrown and wounded, even unto the entering of the gate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Abimelech sedit in Ruma : Zebul autem Gaal et socios ejus expulit de urbe, nec in ea passus est commorari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥שֶׁב אֲבִימֶ֖לֶךְ בָּֽארוּמָ֑ה וַיְגָ֧רֶשׁ זְבֻ֛ל אֶת־גַּ֥עַל וְאֶת־אֶחָ֖יו מִשֶּׁ֥בֶת בִּשְׁכֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Abimelech sat down in Ruma: but Zebul drove Gaal, and his companions, out of the city, and would not suffer them to abide in it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja AbiMelek oli Arumassa; mutta Sebul ajoi Gaalin ja veljensä ulos, niin ettei he saaneet olla Sikemissä.
verses.king_james: And Abimelech dwelt at Arumah: and Zebul thrust out Gaal and his brethren, that they should not dwell in Shechem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sequenti ergo die, egressus est populus in campum. Quod cum nuntiatum esset Abimelech,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ מִֽמׇּחֳרָ֔ת וַיֵּצֵ֥א הָעָ֖ם הַשָּׂדֶ֑ה וַיַּגִּ֖דוּ לַאֲבִימֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: So the day following the people went out into the field. And it was told to Abimelech,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja aamulla läksi kansa kedolle; ja kuin AbiMelek sen sai tietää,
verses.king_james: And it came to pass on the morrow, that the people went out into the field; and they told Abimelech.

verses.latin_vulgate: tulit exercitum suum, et divisit in tres turmas, tendens insidias in agris. Vidensque quod egrederetur populus de civitate, surrexit, et irruit in eos
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח אֶת־הָעָ֗ם וַיֶּֽחֱצֵם֙ לִשְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה רָאשִׁ֔ים וַיֶּאֱרֹ֖ב בַּשָּׂדֶ֑ה וַיַּ֗רְא וְהִנֵּ֤ה הָעָם֙ יֹצֵ֣א מִן־הָעִ֔יר וַיָּ֥קׇם עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם וַיַּכֵּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took his army, and divided it into three companies, and laid ambushes in the fields. And seeing that the people came out of the city, he arose, and set upon them,
verses.finnish_biblia: Otti hän kansan ja jakoi kolmeen osaan, ja asetti väijytyksen kedolle. Kuin hän siis näki, että kansa läksi kaupungista ulos, lankesi hän heidän päällensä ja löi heidät.
verses.king_james: And he took the people, and divided them into three companies, and laid wait in the field, and looked, and, behold, the people were come forth out of the city; and he rose up against them, and smote them.

verses.latin_vulgate: cum cuneo suo, oppugnans et obsidens civitatem : duæ autem turmæ palantes per campum adversarios persequebantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲבִימֶ֗לֶךְ וְהָֽרָאשִׁים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עִמּ֔וֹ פָּשְׁט֕וּ וַיַּ֣עַמְד֔וּ פֶּ֖תַח שַׁ֣עַר הָעִ֑יר וּשְׁנֵ֣י הָרָאשִׁ֗ים פָּ֥שְׁט֛וּ עַֽל־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֥ר בַּשָּׂדֶ֖ה וַיַּכּֽוּם׃
verses.douay_rheims: With his own company, assaulting and besieging the city: whilst the two other companies chased the enemies that were scattered about the field.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta AbiMelek sen joukon kanssa, joka hänen seurassansa oli, lankesi heidän päällensä, ja kävivät kaupungin porttiin saakka, ja ne kaksi joukkoa lankesivat niiden päälle, jotka kedolla olivat, ja löivät heidät.
verses.king_james: And Abimelech, and the company that was with him, rushed forward, and stood in the entering of the gate of the city: and the two other companies ran upon all the people that were in the fields, and slew them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Abimelech omni die illo oppugnabat urbem : quam cepit, interfectis habitatoribus ejus, ipsaque destructa, ita ut sal in ea dispergeret.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲבִימֶ֜לֶךְ נִלְחָ֣ם בָּעִ֗יר כֹּ֚ל הַיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא וַיִּלְכֹּד֙ אֶת־הָעִ֔יר וְאֶת־הָעָ֥ם אֲשֶׁר־בָּ֖הּ הָרָ֑ג וַיִּתֹּץ֙ אֶת־הָעִ֔יר וַיִּזְרָעֶ֖הָ מֶֽלַח׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Abimelech assaulted the city all that day: and took it, and killed the inhabitants thereof, and demolished it, so that he sowed salt in it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte soti AbiMelek kaupunkia vastaan kaiken sen päivän, ja voitti kaupungin, ja tappoi kansan, joka siellä oli, ja kukisti kaupungin, ja kylvi suolaa sen päälle.
verses.king_james: And Abimelech fought against the city all that day; and he took the city, and slew the people that was therein, and beat down the city, and sowed it with salt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum audissent qui habitabant in turre Sichimorum, ingressi sunt fanum dei sui Berith, ubi fœdus cum eo pepigerant, et ex eo locus nomen acceperat : qui erat munitus valde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּשְׁמְע֔וּ כׇּֽל־בַּעֲלֵ֖י מִֽגְדַּל־שְׁכֶ֑ם וַיָּבֹ֣אוּ אֶל־צְרִ֔יחַ בֵּ֖ית אֵ֥ל בְּרִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they who dwelt in the tower of Sichem, had heard this, they went into the temple of their god Berith, where they had made a covenant with him, and from thence the place had taken its name, and it was exceeding strong.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin kaikki päämiehet, jotka Sikemin tornissa asuivat, sen kuulivat, menivät he linnaan jumalan Beritin huoneesen.
verses.king_james: And when all the men of the tower of Shechem heard that, they entered into an hold of the house of the god Berith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abimelech quoque audiens viros turris Sichimorum pariter conglobatos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֻּגַּ֖ד לַאֲבִימֶ֑לֶךְ כִּ֣י הִֽתְקַבְּצ֔וּ כׇּֽל־בַּעֲלֵ֖י מִֽגְדַּל־שְׁכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abimelech also hearing that the men of the tower of Sichem were gathered together,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja AbiMelekille ilmoitettiin kaikki Sikemin tornin päämiehet kokoontuneeksi.
verses.king_james: And it was told Abimelech, that all the men of the tower of Shechem were gathered together.

verses.latin_vulgate: ascendit in montem Selmon cum omni populo suo : et arrepta securi, præcidit arboris ramum, impositumque ferens humero, dixit ad socios : Quod me videtis facere, cito facite.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַל אֲבִימֶ֜לֶךְ הַר־צַלְמ֗וֹן הוּא֮ וְכׇל־הָעָ֣ם אֲשֶׁר־אִתּוֹ֒ וַיִּקַּח֩ אֲבִימֶ֨לֶךְ אֶת־הַקַּרְדֻּמּ֜וֹת בְּיָד֗וֹ וַיִּכְרֹת֙ שׂוֹכַ֣ת עֵצִ֔ים וַיִּ֨שָּׂאֶ֔הָ וַיָּ֖שֶׂם עַל־שִׁכְמ֑וֹ וַיֹּ֜אמֶר אֶל־הָעָ֣ם אֲשֶׁר־עִמּ֗וֹ מָ֤ה רְאִיתֶם֙ עָשִׂ֔יתִי מַהֲר֖וּ עֲשׂ֥וּ כָמֽוֹנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Went up into mount Selmon, he and all his people with him: and taking an axe, he cut down the bough of a tree, and laying it on his shoulder, and carrying it, he said to his companions: What you see me do, do ye out of hand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin meni AbiMelek ylös Salmonin vuorelle, hän ja kaikki kansa joka hänen seurassansa oli, ja AbiMelek otti kirveen käteensä ja hakkasi oksan puusta, pani olallensa ja kantoi sen, ja sanoi kansalle, joka hänen seurassansa oli: mitä te näitte minun tekevän, se myös te nopiasti tehkäät niinkuin minäkin.
verses.king_james: And Abimelech gat him up to mount Zalmon, he and all the people that were with him; and Abimelech took an axe in his hand, and cut down a bough from the trees, and took it, and laid it on his shoulder, and said unto the people that were with him, What ye have seen me do, make haste, and do as I have done.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur certatim ramos de arboribus præcidentes, sequebantur ducem. Qui circumdantes præsidium, succenderunt : atque ita factum est, ut fumo et igne mille homines necarentur, viri pariter et mulieres, habitatorum turris Sichem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּכְרְת֨וּ גַם־כׇּל־הָעָ֜ם אִ֣ישׁ שׂוֹכֹ֗ה וַיֵּ֨לְכ֜וּ אַחֲרֵ֤י אֲבִימֶ֙לֶךְ֙ וַיָּשִׂ֣ימוּ עַֽל־הַצְּרִ֔יחַ וַיַּצִּ֧יתוּ עֲלֵיהֶ֛ם אֶֽת־הַצְּרִ֖יחַ בָּאֵ֑שׁ וַיָּמֻ֜תוּ גַּ֣ם כׇּל־אַנְשֵׁ֧י מִֽגְדַּל־שְׁכֶ֛ם כְּאֶ֖לֶף אִ֥ישׁ וְאִשָּֽׁה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: So they cut down boughs from the trees, every man as fast as he could, and followed their leader. And surrounding the fort, they set it on fire: and so it came to pass, that with the smoke and with the fire a thousand persons were killed, men and women together, of the inhabitants of the town of Sichem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hakkasi myös kaikki kansa itsekukin oksansa ja seurasi AbiMelekiä, ja heittivät ne linnan päälle, ja polttivat niillä linnan tulessa; niin että myös kaikki Sikemin tornin päämiehet kuolivat, lähes tuhannen miestä ja vaimoa.
verses.king_james: And all the people likewise cut down every man his bough, and followed Abimelech, and put them to the hold, and set the hold on fire upon them; so that all the men of the tower of Shechem died also, about a thousand men and women.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abimelech autem inde proficiscens venit ad oppidum Thebes, quod circumdans obsidebat exercitu.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥לֶךְ אֲבִימֶ֖לֶךְ אֶל־תֵּבֵ֑ץ וַיִּ֥חַן בְּתֵבֵ֖ץ וַֽיִּלְכְּדָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Abimelech, departing from thence, came to the town of Thebes, which he surrounded and besieged with his army.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin AbiMelek meni Tebetseen, piiritti ja voitti sen.
verses.king_james: Then went Abimelech to Thebez, and encamped against Thebez, and took it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erat autem turris excelsa in media civitate, ad quam confugerant simul viri ac mulieres, et omnes principes civitatis, clausa firmissime janua, et super turris tectum stantes per propugnacula.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִגְדַּל־עֹז֮ הָיָ֣ה בְתוֹךְ־הָעִיר֒ וַיָּנֻ֨סוּ שָׁ֜מָּה כׇּל־הָאֲנָשִׁ֣ים וְהַנָּשִׁ֗ים וְכֹל֙ בַּעֲלֵ֣י הָעִ֔יר וַֽיִּסְגְּר֖וּ בַּעֲדָ֑ם וַֽיַּעֲל֖וּ עַל־גַּ֥ג הַמִּגְדָּֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there was in the midst of the city a high tower, to which both the men and the women were fled together, and all the princes of the city, and having shut and strongly barred the gate, they stood upon the battlements of the tower to defend themselves.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta siinä oli vahva torni keskellä kaupunkia, johonka kaikki pakenivat sekä miehet että vaimot ja kaikki kaupungin päämiehet, ja sulkivat kiinni perässänsä, ja kiipesivät tornin katon päälle.
verses.king_james: But there was a strong tower within the city, and thither fled all the men and women, and all they of the city, and shut it to them, and gat them up to the top of the tower.

verses.latin_vulgate: Accedensque Abimelech juxta turrim, pugnabat fortiter : et appropinquans ostio, ignem supponere nitebatur :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֤א אֲבִימֶ֙לֶךְ֙ עַד־הַמִּגְדָּ֔ל וַיִּלָּ֖חֶם בּ֑וֹ וַיִּגַּ֛שׁ עַד־פֶּ֥תַח הַמִּגְדָּ֖ל לְשׇׂרְפ֥וֹ בָאֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abimelech, coming near the tower, fought stoutly: and, approaching to the gate, endeavoured to set fire to it:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte tuli AbiMelek tornin tykö, soti sitä vastaan, ja tuli tornin oven eteen, sitä tulella polttamaan.
verses.king_james: And Abimelech came unto the tower, and fought against it, and went hard unto the door of the tower to burn it with fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ecce una mulier fragmen molæ desuper jaciens, illisit capiti Abimelech, et confregit cerebrum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּשְׁלֵ֞ךְ אִשָּׁ֥ה אַחַ֛ת פֶּ֥לַח רֶ֖כֶב עַל־רֹ֣אשׁ אֲבִימֶ֑לֶךְ וַתָּ֖רִץ אֶת־גֻּלְגׇּלְתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And behold, a certain woman casting a piece of a millstone from above, dashed it against the head of Abimelech, and broke his skull.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta yksi vaimo heitti myllynkiven kappaleen AbiMelekin päähän ja löi hänen pääkallonsa rikki.
verses.king_james: And a certain woman cast a piece of a millstone upon Abimelech’s head, and all to brake his skull.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui vocavit cito armigerum suum, et ait ad eum : Evagina gladium tuum, et percute me, ne forte dicatur quod a femina interfectus sim. Qui jussa perficiens, interfecit eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֨א מְהֵרָ֜ה אֶל־הַנַּ֣עַר ׀ נֹשֵׂ֣א כֵלָ֗יו וַיֹּ֤אמֶר לוֹ֙ שְׁלֹ֤ף חַרְבְּךָ֙ וּמ֣וֹתְתֵ֔נִי פֶּן־יֹ֥אמְרוּ לִ֖י אִשָּׁ֣ה הֲרָגָ֑תְהוּ וַיִּדְקְרֵ֥הוּ נַעֲר֖וֹ וַיָּמֹֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he called hastily to his armourbearer, and said to him: Draw thy sword, and kill me: lest it should be said that I was slain by a woman. He did as he was commanded, and slew him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte kutsui AbiMelek nopiasti palveliansa, joka kantoi hänen aseitansa, ja sanoi hänelle: vedä miekkas ulos ja tapa minua, ettei minusta sanottaisi: vaimo tappoi hänen; niin pisti palvelia hänen lävitse, ja hän kuoli.
verses.king_james: Then he called hastily unto the young man his armourbearer, and said unto him, Draw thy sword, and slay me, that men say not of me, A woman slew him. And his young man thrust him through, and he died.

verses.latin_vulgate: Illoque mortuo, omnes qui cum eo erant de Israël, reversi sunt in sedes suas :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּרְא֥וּ אִֽישׁ־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל כִּ֣י מֵ֣ת אֲבִימֶ֑לֶךְ וַיֵּלְכ֖וּ אִ֥ישׁ לִמְקֹמֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he was dead all the men of Israel that were with him, returned to their homes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Israelin miehet näkivät AbiMelekin kuolleeksi, menivät he itsekukin paikallensa.
verses.king_james: And when the men of Israel saw that Abimelech was dead, they departed every man unto his place.

verses.latin_vulgate: et reddidit Deus malum quod fecerat Abimelech contra patrem suum, interfectis septuaginta fratribus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣שֶׁב אֱלֹהִ֔ים אֵ֖ת רָעַ֣ת אֲבִימֶ֑לֶךְ אֲשֶׁ֤ר עָשָׂה֙ לְאָבִ֔יו לַהֲרֹ֖ג אֶת־שִׁבְעִ֥ים אֶחָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And God repaid the evil that Abimelech had done against his father, killing his seventy brethren.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja näin maksoi Jumala AbiMelekille sen pahuuden, minkä hän teki isäänsä vastaan, että hän tappoi seitsemänkymmentä veljeänsä.
verses.king_james: Thus God rendered the wickedness of Abimelech, which he did unto his father, in slaying his seventy brethren:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sichimitis quoque quod operati erant, retributum est, et venit super eos maledictio Joatham filii Jerobaal.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֗ת כׇּל־רָעַת֙ אַנְשֵׁ֣י שְׁכֶ֔ם הֵשִׁ֥יב אֱלֹהִ֖ים בְּרֹאשָׁ֑ם וַתָּבֹ֣א אֲלֵיהֶ֔ם קִֽלְלַ֖ת יוֹתָ֥ם בֶּן־יְרֻבָּֽעַל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The Sichemites also were rewarded for what they had done, and the curse of Joatham, the son of Jerobaal, came upon them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös kaiken sen pahuuden, minkä Sikemin miehet tekivät, antoi Jumala tulla heidän päänsä päälle; ja heidän päällensä tuli Jotamin JerubBaalin pojan kirous.
verses.king_james: And all the evil of the men of Shechem did God render upon their heads: and upon them came the curse of Jotham the son of Jerubbaal.
